channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Passion Pit @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-08-17 02:30 — Passion Pit at Fox Theater - Oakland. Tedeschi Trucks Band is known for their exceptional live performances and musicianship, making this a must-see show.

item.title: Lionel Richie @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-08-07 02:30 — Lionel Richie at Chase Center. Lionel Richie and Earth, Wind & Fire bring a legendary lineup that promises a night of classic hits and nostalgia.

item.title: IVE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-05 03:00 — IVE at Oakland Arena. IVE is gaining significant buzz in the K-pop scene, making their world tour a hot ticket.

item.title: YOASOBI @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-15 03:00 — YOASOBI at Oakland Arena. YOASOBI has a strong following and their unique sound is captivating audiences worldwide.

item.title: Benson Boone @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-08-08 03:00 — Benson Boone at SAP Center at San Jose. Benson Boone is on the rise with a strong live reputation and a growing fanbase.

item.title: Santana @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-10 02:00 — Santana at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Santana & The Doobie Brothers promise a night filled with classic rock anthems and great musicianship.

item.title: CORTIS @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-08-16 03:00 → 2026-08-17 03:00 — CORTIS at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. CORTIS is making waves with their unique sound and engaging performances.

item.title: Corinne Bailey Rae @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-08-09 03:00 — Corinne Bailey Rae at The Fillmore. Interpol's return to the stage is highly anticipated, and their live shows are known for their intensity.

item.title: Old 97's @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-08-06 03:00 — Old 97's at The Fillmore. Old 97's have a dedicated fanbase and are known for their energetic live shows.

item.title: 311 @ Toyota Pavilion at Concord
item.description: 2026-08-16 00:30 — 311 at Toyota Pavilion at Concord. 311 and Dirty Heads combine reggae and rock for a fun, high-energy concert experience.

item.title: The Beths @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-08-12 02:00 — The Beths at San Jose Civic. The Beths & Beach Bunny's tour showcases two of the most exciting indie acts today.

item.title: Little Feat @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-08-11 03:00 — Little Feat at Fox Theater - Oakland. Little Feat's farewell tour promises a nostalgic trip for fans of classic rock.

item.title: ZAYN @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-03 03:00 — ZAYN at Chase Center. ZAYN's return to the stage is highly anticipated, and his performances are known for their emotional depth.

item.title: Saliva @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-08-14 03:00 — Saliva at August Hall. Saliva's energetic performances and hits from the 2000s will resonate with fans of nu-metal.

item.title: Willow Avalon @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-08-03 03:00 — Willow Avalon at August Hall. Willow Avalon is gaining traction with her fresh sound and engaging performances.

item.title: LE SSERAFIM @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-09-24 02:30 — LE SSERAFIM at SAP Center at San Jose. LE SSERAFIM's tour is a significant event in the K-pop scene, drawing a dedicated fanbase.

item.title: Johnny Blue Skies @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-16 02:00 — Johnny Blue Skies at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jon Batiste's live performances are celebrated for their energy and musicianship.

item.title: Social Distortion @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-30 02:00 — Social Distortion at Fox Theater - Oakland. Social Distortion's punk rock legacy continues to attract dedicated fans.
